why: Recurring need for a formal APPROVE/REJECT gate after review-360 reports — separation of duties between reviewer and approver is a standing architectural requirement for the research change-control workflow
standing need: 360-degree pre-approval review of build-spec items and algorithm modifications — named by user as a specialist subagent requirement
360 review of BUILD-SPECS A1 info-gain selection — overall 78/100, needs-revision (critical floor on Correctness=78)
A1-info-gain change approval gate
A1-info-gain change approval gate (round-2)
360 review of BUILD-SPECS A5 warm-start from learners-like-you
Round-2 360 review of A5 warm-start revised spec — all three Round-1 blockers resolved; overall 58->72; needs-revision on diversity-filter algorithm and divergent-learner bound

Round-3 360 review of A5 warm-start re-revised spec — MMR diversity filter partially resolves Blocker 1; but Blocker 2 (convergence bound) introduced new arithmetic error (0.10 at n_own=27 is wrong; actual 0.125); Correctness drops to 68; overall 72->68; needs-revision

Round-4 360 review of A5 warm-start fourth revision — all three R3 blockers resolved (arithmetic error fixed, div formula specified, formula inconsistency resolved); overall 68->78; needs-revision on Safety enforcement (5.3) and missing test_mmr_diversity_filter

Round-5 360 review of A5 warm-start fifth revision — both R4 targeted gaps closed: Safety enforcement upgraded to 3-layer invariant (architectural+static-check+test), test_mmr_diversity_filter added; overall 78->80; ready-for-approval; adversarial objection: byte-identical test claim may be unpassable

Round-6 360 review of A5 warm-start final revision — byte-identical test corrected to set-membership invariant (warm prior legitimately shifts reach_weight values; only set membership must be invariant); overall 80->82; all CRITICAL dimensions pass (Correctness 87, RedTeam 82, Safety 85); ready-for-approval
A5-warmstart change approval gate

360 review of B1 misconception clustering build-spec — lift gate missing significant() (RC-1 reintroduction), no misconception retirement (RC-4 analog), τ_coh undefined, plug-point underspecified; overall 65/100; needs-revision

360 review of B2 prerequisite-gap diagnosis build-spec — BFS stopping rule incorrect, hard ĉ<θ criterion reintroduces RC-1, d_max and confirmation item count lack defaults, correlational-attribution claim overstated; overall 68/100; needs-revision

360 review of B3 cross-agent skill transfer / fleet learning — zero-trust claim unenforced (no architectural invariant), shared item bank defeats independence assumption, §8 safety+cumulative gates not referenced for transfer commits, provision_suite invariant unreconciled, sim_bar and validation threshold lack defaults, 6 blocking issues; overall 65/100; needs-revision
360 review of B4 forgetting-aware spacing build-spec

Round-2 360 review of B3 fleet transfer — all six round-1 blockers resolved; two remaining gaps (MMR diversity weight default missing, isomorphic-variant definition underspecified) keep RedTeam at 78, pinning overall to 78/100; needs-revision with two targeted fixes to clear 80

Round-2 360 review of revised B2 prereq-gap spec — RC-1 branch-local descent and post-redirect outcome loop both verified as resolved; overall 68->78; needs-revision on missing defaults (d_max, gap-confirmation count, trigger threshold), temporal validity of outcome-feedback window, edge-confidence filter in BFS walk, B1 interface

Round-2 360 review of B4 forgetting-aware spacing — two blockers resolved (S_min floor, cramming reframing); four remain (raw binary S-update RC-1, p_probe underspecified, ĉ_mastery naming, interleave default/due-boost); overall 72/100; needs-revision

Round-3 360 review of B3 fleet transfer — both R2 blockers verified resolved: MMR diversity weight λ_div=0.5 added to Parameters, isomorphic variants defined for agent skills as same task structure with freshly sampled operands/context-IDs/surface params verified by §4.2 trajectory-shape+counterfactual check; critical floor lifts to 82 (was 78), overall 82/100; ready-for-approval with six non-blocking pre-implementation notes

Round-3 360 review of B1 misconception clustering — all three R2 blockers verified resolved: arm-size floor >=20 per side added, lift-gate z relaxed to 1.0 with calibration backstop, lift estimated on §4 held-out split, retirement window defaulted to 50 evals; critical floor lifts to 82 (was 78), overall 82/100; ready-for-approval with seven non-blocking pre-implementation notes
360 review Round 3 of B2 prerequisite-gap diagnosis build-spec
Round-3 360 review of B4 forgetting-aware spacing — all five round-2 blockers resolved; overall 72->82/100; ready-for-approval with four non-blocking implementation-phase recommendations

360 review of §16 unified retrieval — additive section merging 5-store RAG into the learner as a typed action scored by value-of-information; overall 71/100; needs-revision (6 blockers: z-score normalization regression, EIG_Q type underspecified, §6 dispatch path missing, coverage-floor interaction unresolved, §15.4 determinism restriction not carried forward, EIG_Q estimation timing unspecified)

360 review round-2 of §16 unified retrieval — all six round-1 blockers verified resolved; critical floor lifts to 80 (Correctness 88, RedTeam 80, Safety 84), overall 80/100; ready-for-approval; three pre-implementation notes for companion build-spec (inner-loop stopping condition, reranker update timing, per-EXPAND step budget)

360 review round-3 of §16 unified retrieval — all three round-2 non-blocking items verified resolved: inner-loop stopping condition (significant(EIG_Q,SE)+b_ret+K), reranker cold-path batched update, b_ret named; critical floor lifts to 84 (Correctness 89, RedTeam 84, Safety 86), overall 84/100; ready-for-approval; companion build-spec must add New Parameters subsection (b_ret, K, Q-initial Beta) and clarify which §8 clause gates reranker weights
S16-unified-retrieval change approval gate

360 review of §17 self-modification axis + §18 multi-agent populations — immutability wall incomplete (item-generation layer unprotected, RC-2 attack path open), §9 two-stage promotion inapplicable to code, fleet-coverage formula absent, A5 prior leakage at fleet scale, no compound fleet×self-modify safety test; overall 45/100; needs-revision (8 blockers)

360 review round-2 of §17 self-modification axis + §18 multi-agent populations — all eight round-1 blockers verified resolved: SOLVE/JUDGE partition with explicit manifest (incl. provision_suite, TeacherAdapter, budget enforcer), code-specific two-stage promotion (§17.3), fleet-coverage formula with derived |fleet|=1 degeneracy, A5 prior leakage bounded below significance, §12 parameters registered, BUILD-SPECS G1 go-decision recorded, compound fleet×self-modify test stub added; critical floor lifts to 80 (Correctness 82, RedTeam 80, Safety 80), overall 80/100; ready-for-approval; three pre-implementation notes for companion BUILD-SPECS item (static analysis tool completeness, Stage-2 rollback trigger, fleet-cache staleness bound)

360 review round-3 of §17 self-modification axis + §18 multi-agent populations — all three round-2 pre-implementation notes verified resolved: (1) sound/conservative static check + capability-isolation runtime backstop closes static-analysis completeness concern; (2) Stage-2 rollback trigger now specified as significant(Δ,SE) over w_promo window; (3) τ_cache parameter registered and conservative φ=1 on stale/missing is architecturally safe; critical floor lifts to 82 (Correctness 84, RedTeam 82, Safety 82), overall 82/100; ready-for-approval; one BUILD-SPECS note: JUDGE boundary must be a machine-readable artifact with governance process for boundary updates under self-modify evolution
